chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-293 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on office objection For hearing of MA-1798/24 (stay) For hearing of main case 01.08.2024 Mr. Abdul Azeem Abbasi advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl: A.G. ----------- Petitioner has directly approached this Court seeking redirection of a public water supply scheme to his village. Learned counsel is confronted as to maintainability inter alia on the ground as to how this Court could interfere in a policy matter, especially, in the present instance when there is no discernable effort by the petitioner to approach the concerned authorities and direct recourse to the High Court has been adopted. Furthermore, the arguments articulated are factual in nature insofar as the benefit and determent of the water course are concerned and such factual controversies are not amenable to adjudication in the writ jurisdiction of this Court. The petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE g
